US_01,User Onboarding,Splash Screen,"As a user, I want the splash screen and application to show the logo and name, so I can see the application opening.","1. User should have downloaded the application from Playstore/App store.
2. User should have launched the application by clicking on the App icon.","1. The user will be displayed with the Project name App logo and App name in English.

2. The splash screen will be visible for maximum of 2-3 seconds(depending on the appearance).

3. The user will be redirected to 'Intro' screens after viewing the splash screen.

4. Existing users of the App who are already logged in will be displayed with the splash screen and will then be taken to Home Screen of the App. 

Business Rules:
1. Branding Consistency - The splash screen should adhere to the application's branding guidelines, ensuring consistency in terms of logo usage, colors, typography, and overall visual identity.

2. Duration Limitation - The splash screen should have a limited display duration to provide a smooth and efficient user experience. It should load quickly an

typography, and overall visual identity.

2. Duration Limitation - The splash screen should have a limited display duration to provide a smooth and efficient user experience. It should load quickly and transition to the main screen promptly to avoid unnecessary delays.

3.  Loading Indicators - The splash screen may incorporate loading indicators or animations to provide visual feedback to the user, indicating that the application is being prepared for use. These indicators should be informative, visually appealing, and appropriately timed.

4. Seamless Transition - The transition from the splash screen to the main screen should be seamless, without any abrupt or jarring visual or functional disruptions. The user should feel a smooth progression from the loading phase to the application's primary interface.

5.  Consistent Brand Messaging - The splash screen can be utilized to convey a concise brand message or tagline that aligns with the application's value proposition or mission. This messaging should be consistent with the overall branding and should be easily comprehensible to the user.

6. Device Orientation Support - The splash screen should adapt to the device's orientation

s messaging should be consistent with the overall branding and should be easily comprehensible to the user.

6. Device Orientation Support - The splash screen should adapt to the device's orientation (portrait or landscape) to ensure a visually appealing presentation regardless of how the user holds their device.

7. Responsive Design - The splash screen should be designed responsively to fit different screen sizes and resolutions, providing an optimal visual experience across various devices.

8. Compliance with Platform Guidelines - The design and behavior of the splash screen should adhere to the guidelines and requirements set by the target platform (e.g., iOS Human Interface Guidelines, Android Material Design), ensuring a consistent user experience within the platform's ecosystem.","1. The splash screen should load quickly to ensure a smooth transition.
2. Any necessary data or resources required for the main screen should be preloaded during the splash screen display.","1. Network Connection Issues:
a. The app may encounter a problem connecting to the internet, resulting in a failure to load data or resources needed for the splash screen.
b. This can be due to a weak or unav

rk Connection Issues:
a. The app may encounter a problem connecting to the internet, resulting in a failure to load data or resources needed for the splash screen.
b. This can be due to a weak or unavailable network connection, server issues, or firewall restrictions.
c. Error message : ""Unable to connect to the internet. Please check your network connection and try again.""

2. Backend or Server Errors:
a. This can occur if there are issues with the backend servers, database connectivity, or API integration.
b. Error message ::""Oops! Something went wrong on our servers. Please try again later.""

3. Timeouts or Delays:
a. In some cases, the splash screen may take an extended period to load, or the loading process may time out.
b. This can happen if the app is processing a large amount of data during startup or if there are delays in resource loading.
c. Error message : ""Oops! The app took too long to load. Please try relaunching or contact support for help.""",,
US_02,User Onboarding (New User),Tutorial Screen,"As a user, I want the new user to view the Intro screens with an image and further information about the application in a dynamic form.","1. User should have downloaded

ng (New User),Tutorial Screen,"As a user, I want the new user to view the Intro screens with an image and further information about the application in a dynamic form.","1. User should have downloaded the application from Playstore/App store
2. User should have launched the application by clicking on the App icon
3. User should have viewed the splash screen of the application.
","1. The user will see the 3 carousels having images along with the application specific text on the same. 
2. The Images will be dynamic and will change automatically.
3. Once the user has reached the third screen, they will will automatically be redirected to the Login screen
4. These Intro screens will appear for 4-5 seconds 

Business Rules:
1. Only first-time users and users who have reinstalled the application will view this screen.
2. These screens will be dynamic and will keep on changing if updated from the admin panel.
3. The Intro screens content and Image will be configured and managed from the Admin panel.
4. If in a event the server is not responding then in that case defailt ""Intro screen"" will be shown.","1. Tutorial Screen Display:
The tutorial screen should be displayed only for new users

panel.
4. If in a event the server is not responding then in that case defailt ""Intro screen"" will be shown.","1. Tutorial Screen Display:
The tutorial screen should be displayed only for new users or those who have not completed it before.
Users who have previously completed the tutorial should not see it again when they open the app.

2. Swipe Navigation:
Users should be able to swipe left or right on the tutorial screen to navigate between the three images.
The app should smoothly transition between images with a swipe gesture.

3. Skip Functionality:
The tutorial screen should include a prominent ""Skip"" button in a visible location.
When users click on the ""Skip"" button, they should be directed to the app's main interface or home screen.

4. Completing the Tutorial:
Once the user completes the tutorial by swiping through all three images or clicking the ""Skip"" button, the app should mark the tutorial as completed for that user.

5. Caption Content:
Each image in the tutorial should have a concise and informative caption describing the app's features or functionalities.
The captions should be easy to read and understand, providing a clear overview of what the app offers.

l should have a concise and informative caption describing the app's features or functionalities.
The captions should be easy to read and understand, providing a clear overview of what the app offers.

6. Tutorial Accessibility:
The tutorial screen should be responsive and accessible on various screen sizes and orientations to accommodate different devices.","1.  Tutorial Unavailable
Description: This error occurs when the tutorial screen is not accessible to the user.
Message:
 ""Oops! The tutorial is currently unavailable. Please try again later.""

2.   Swipe Navigation Error
Description: This error indicates an issue with swiping to navigate between tutorial images.
Message: 
""Oops! There was a problem navigating the tutorial. Please try again.""

3. Unable to Skip Tutorial
Description: This error occurs if the ""Skip"" button fails to function correctly.
Message: 
""Sorry, we couldn't skip the tutorial. Please try again later.""

4. Missing Caption
Description: This error indicates that a caption is missing for one of the tutorial images.
Message:
 ""Oops! A caption is missing for this image. Please check back later.""

5.  Network Connection Issue
Description: This error occ

es that a caption is missing for one of the tutorial images.
Message:
 ""Oops! A caption is missing for this image. Please check back later.""

5.  Network Connection Issue
Description: This error occurs if there's a problem with the user's network connection while accessing the tutorial.
Message: 
""Please check your internet connection and try again to access the tutorial.""",,
US_03,Onboarding,Sign in ," As a user, I want to Sign In to the application so that I can get myself authenticated and navigate inside the app.","1. The existing user should have the viewed the Splash screen then they will get auto-redirected to the Login screen.
2. The new users must first view the splash screen, then the intro screen, after which they will be automatically redirected to the Login screen.
","On the Login screen the user will view the following details:
1. The user will view the Reel logo along with heading with the specific text on the screen.

2. The user will view the following input fields:

2.1 Enter Phone
- The user can enter their verified email here.
- By default, this field will be empty and will dipslay the text ""Enter your Phone"" in light colour which will be removed once the

:

2.1 Enter Phone
- The user can enter their verified email here.

   -- The user will view the Search box clicking on which they will be able to Search for a country by typing
  -- The user will view the list with Country name and code
  
- This field will be the Mandatory field.


3. The user will view the ""Next"" button which will get enabled once the mandatory field is correctly entered.

3.1 By default, the ""Next"" button will be disabled.

3.2 By clicking on ""Next""button the user will get redirected to the ""Verify through OTP screen"".

3.3 On this screen the user the will view following details:

- Enter 4 digit OTP boxes
- The user will view 60 seconds timer
- Once the timer ends the user will view Resend OTP link clicking on which they will be able to view the bottom sheet confirming the user has received the OTP again or not.
- On successfully entering the OTP the user will be a

user will view Resend OTP link clicking on which they will be able to view the bottom sheet confirming the user has received the OTP again or not.
- On successfully entering the OTP the user will be able to click on the Submit button which will redirect user to the Homescreen.


Business Rules:
1. If the user is not linked with Reel then in that case while entering the phone and clicking on send OTP the user will view the error message stating ""The user is not linked with exisitng Reel portal.

2. User can request for consecutive 3 code after which they have to wait for 15 minutes to request new code.

Note:
- If user enters wrong OTP, error message will be shown stating ""Invalid OTP""
- I can generate max of 3 OTPs continuously, after 3 attempts I need to wait for a pre-defined time of 15 minutes to get the forgot password and resend buttons to be enabled. ","Phone number
Minimum number of digits for a mobile number is 5 [Country:Saint Helena]
&
Max digits for a mobile number is 13 [Country: Austria ]

US_05,Onboarding,Signup,"As a user, I want to signup so that I can access the functionalities as a registered user.","1. The user should have viewed the Splash screen.
2. The user should be on the Login screen then by clicking on the ""Sign Up"" link the user will get redirected to the ""Sign up"" screen.","On the Sign up screen the user will view the following details:
1.  The user will view the ""Welcome"" heading with the specific text on the screen.

2. The user will view the following input fields:

2.1 Enter Full name

2.2 Enter EMAIL

2.3 Enter Phone number
- The user can enter Phone number whichever they want to verify.

2.3.1 If the user starts entering the number then:
 -- By default, +1 country code will be shown.
 -- By tapping on this (+1) the user will view the list of countries with name and country code.
 -- The user will also be able to search by typing the country name/code.
 -- There will be a vertical scroll on the country code popup. 

- By default, this field will be empty and will display the text ""Enter your Phone number "" in light colour which will be remo

/code.
 -- There will be a vertical scroll on the country code popup. 

- By default, this field will be empty and will display the text ""Enter your Phone number "" in light colour which will be removed once the user starts writing their preference.

- This field will be the Mandatory field.

3. The user will also  view the Chechbox for Agreeing to the the application terms on checking the terms and all the mandatory fields the user will be able to view the highlighted Signup button.

4. Once all the above mandatory fields are filled the user will view the ""Signup"" button.

4.1 By default, the Sign up button will be disabled.

5. For an existing user who Already Have An Account, can click on the ""Sign-in"" link by clicking on which they will get redirected to the Login screen.

6. The user after clicking on the Signup button will get reditected to the ""Verify your account"" screen where they will be able to enter the 4 digit OTP receive on their Phone.

Note:
1. As a new user, when I open the application for the first time, I should be presented with a signup screen where I can create a new account. The signup screen should have clear and user-friendly input fields to collect

n I open the application for the first time, I should be presented with a signup screen where I can create a new account. The signup screen should have clear and user-friendly input fields to collect necessary information, such as my name, email address, and a password.

2. The signup screen should also include a checkbox or option to agree to the application's terms and conditions and privacy policy. By checking this option, I understand and accept the terms and conditions set forth by the application.

5. Once the user have successfully completed the signup process, the application should create a new user account associated with the provided Phone no. and securely store my information. I should then be redirected to the application's main screen or guided through an initial onboarding process to personalize my experience and explore its features.

6. By providing a seamless and intuitive signup screen, the application enables me, as a new user, to easily create an account and begin utilizing the application's functionalities, enhancing my overall user experience.

Note:

- I can generate max of 3

US_06,Onboarding,Verify my account,"As a user, I want to authenticate Mobile Number Via OTP.","1. The user should be on the Signup screen then by clicking on the ""Signup button"" which will redirect them to the Verify your account"" screen","On the verify your account screen the user will view the following details:
1. The user will view the ""Verify your account"" heading with specified text 

2. On this screen user will see the Timer of 120 seconds.

2.1 Upon expiration of the 120secs  timer, the user will see a Resend code text, clicking on the Resend Code to receive another OTP on mobile.
2.2 By default, OTP input field will be empty
 
3. The user will be able to enter the 4 digit OTP which they have received on their Mobile.

3.1 The user will be able to view the "

ther OTP on mobile.
2.2 By default, OTP input field will be empty
 
3. The user will be able to enter the 4 digit OTP which they have received on their Mobile.

3.1 The user will be able to view the ""Resend"" text link after the expiration of 120secs  timer.

3.2 Each time the user enters the OTP incorrectly, a toast message will appear.

4. After entering the OTP, the user will view the enabled ""Verify OTP"" button clicking on which they will be navigated to the ""Help us to know you more"" screen.


Brief:
1. The application should verify the authenticity of the verification OTP and mark my account as verified upon successful validation. If the verification OTP is invalid or has expired, an appropriate error message should be displayed, guiding me to request a new verification link.

2. Once my account is successfully verified, the user should be able to log in and access the application's features and functionalities without any restrictions. The application should provide a clear confirmation message indicating that my account has been verified and is ready for use.

Note:
- If user enters wrong OTP, error message will be shown stating ""Invalid OTP""
- I can generate max of

confirmation message indicating that my account has been verified and is ready for use.

Note:
- If user enters wrong OTP, error message will be shown stating ""Invalid OTP""
- I can generate max of 3 OTPs continuously, after 3 attempts I need to wait for a pre-defined time of 15 minutes to get the forgot password and resend buttons to be enabled.

4. Only unique and valid email addresses should be allowed during the signup process to prevent potential issues with account verification

2. The user will be able to view the Products and Services on the basis of Location selected.

3. My Preferred Vendor: Based on Department selected in on-boarding process and vendor lying near-by user location, accordingly the vendors will be displayed.If the vendor is related to a selected department but not available in near-by location of the user then the vendor will not be displayed.
3.2 Products display: All products available to the near-by location of the user will be displayed.
3.3 Services: Only services which are available near-by user location.",,,,

US_11,Homescreen,Search,"As a user, I want to perform search so that I can search for the specific preference",The user should be on the Home screen and have clicked on Search box ,"The user by clicking on Search box will get redirected to the search screen where they will view the following options:

- The user will view the ""Search for Products"" ,  ""Search for Services"" ,  ""Search for Vendors""  
- By default, they will view ""Search for Products"" and the text on search screen will dynamically changed to above mentioned options

1.  The user by tapping on search bar will activate cursor with the help of which user would be able to perform the search operation.
2. As soon as user start typing in (one character is typed into the ""Search"" field) a cross button will be activated and result will start to display according to keyin words.
2.11 Tapping on the cross button will clear the search bar and results. 
2.2 The searching will be case insensitive.
2.3 The searching will be from DB
2.3 By default, the search box will be unfilled.

3. The user will view the Recent Searches on the basis of their previous search history.
- By clicking on C

nsitive.
2.3 The searching will be from DB
2.3 By default, the search box will be unfilled.

3. The user will view the Recent Searches on the basis of their previous search history.

- The user while searching will view the list of items
- The user can view the Products, Services, Vendors list 
. The user will be able to filter by tapping on the filter Icon
- Note : The searching result of Products/Services/Vendors will be based on the logic using which the modules are displayed on the Home Screen. (Ref. Business Logic under US_!0)

Search results will be categories w.r.t. Vendor, Services and Products. By default the Vendor tab will be selected.
Search result filters will include following:
- For Products: Sort By, Order Type (Rent, Purchase, Service (with checkbox for multiple selection), Departments with ability to select multiple departments and view the result accordingly.
- For Services: Sort By, Departments( as above) only
- For Vendor: Departments ( only the on-boarding time selected departments will be displayed and user can filter the result based on made selection of the available departments).

ents( as above) only
- For Vendor: Departments ( only the on-boarding time selected departments will be displayed and user can filter the result based on made selection of the available departments).

US_19,My Profile ,Manage Addresses,"As a user, I want to manage address so that I can update irt whenever needed","1. The user should have clicked on the Manage Addresses option which redirects them to the Manage Addresses screen

2. On the home screen if the user has clicked on the Address field from the top, they will get redirected to 'Find Location'  screen","- By clicking on the Manage address screen the user will view the following details:

1. List of Addresses added
- The user will view the list of addresses added by the user with Edit and Delete options
- One Primary Location can not be deleted but can be edited
- For Primary Address I can view the tag 'Primary Location'
- On the other address cards I can view a button 'Make a primary address' by tapping on which that specific card will denote as the primary address and others will not be highlighted as primary anymore.
- Each added address

cards I can view a button 'Make a primary address' by tapping on which that specific card will denote as the primary address and others will not be highlighted as primary anymore.
- Each added address will be displayed in the following order:
* Apartment/Suit Name(in bold)
* Building Name
* Complete address with Zip code

- By clicking on the added address card, I will be navigated to the detail screen where I will be able to edit the address details and save them.
- By clicking on delete address the user will view the confirmation popup and on selecting OK the card will get deleted and removed from the List.
- I can also view and tap on 'Add a new address' CTA to add a new address which will take me to a new screen.

2. Add New AddressThe user by clicking on the Address will view the following input fields:
- First user will be navigated to a screen where he will be able to search for a specific location , the provided address will have a Zip code as well. Once the location is selected the same will be reflected under the location field below
- Location
- Apartment/Suite
- Building name
- Landmark(optional)
Note: While adding new address, user will not see the list of added addres

d the same will be reflected under the location field below
- Location
- Apartment/Suite
- Building name
- Landmark(optional)
Note: While adding new address, user will not see the list of added address.

3. The user will also view the radio button for Drop-off options:
- Hand it to me
- Leave it at Location
- The user will be able to select any one of the above

4. After filling all the mandatory fields the user will be able to click on the Add address button on which the user will get redirected to the Address listing screen where they can view their added address on top.","- Location: Min. 3 and Max. 100 characters allowed.
** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are less than 3 , ""Min. 3 Characters allowed"".

** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are more than 100 , ""Max. 100 Characters allowed"".

- Apartment/Suits: Min. 3 and Max. 100 characters allowed.
** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are less than 3 , ""Min. 3 Characters allowed"".

** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are more than 100 , ""Max. 100 Characters allowed"".

-Building N

d characters are less than 3 , ""Min. 3 Characters allowed"".

** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are more than 100 , ""Max. 100 Characters allowed"".

-Building Name: Min. 3 and Max. 100 characters allowed.
** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are less than 3 , ""Min. 3 Characters allowed"".

** Following error message should be prompted if the entered characters are more than 100 , ""Max. 100 Characters allowed"".

-Landmark: Min. 3 and Max. 100 characters allowed.

Format: Validate that the CVV consists of the expected number of digits (usually 3 for Visa/MasterCard and 4 for American Express).
Numeric: Allow only numeric input for the CVV.
Required

","For CVV:

Format: Validate that the CVV consists of the expected number of digits (usually 3 for Visa/MasterCard and 4 for American Express).
Numeric: Allow only numeric input for the CVV.
Required Field: Confirm that the CVV is a required field.

For Cardholder Name:

Format: Ensure that the name contains only alphabetic characters.
Required Field: Confirm that the cardholder name is a required field.
Minimum and Maximum Length: Set a range for the name length (e.g., 2-50 characters).",,,

4. By clicking on the notification the user will be able to read it on the popup.
- The user will view the ""Ok"" button by clicking on the pop will be closed and user will  taken to notification screen

5. The unread notification will be shown with Higlighted colour

6. The read notification will be shown with White colour.

7. By swiping left the user will be able to view ther remove button by tapping on which they will be able to remove the notification.
7.1 The user will view the confirmation message here

Business Rules:
1. There will be a vertical scrolling in the screen
2. The notifications will be sorted on the  basis of most recent notification on top.
3. The notification will be marked as read when the user clicks on it.","Times
